name: Timer
code:
name = "Timer"
inputs = {"exec_in":"exec","duration":"float","looping":"bool"}
outputs = {"exec_out":"exec","on_tick":"exec","on_complete":"exec","elapsed":"float","progress":"float"}
def process(exec_in, duration, looping):
    # Timer - a safer alternative to Event_Tick for timed operations
    #
    # exec_in: Start the timer
    # duration: Time in seconds (default 1.0)
    # looping: If True, timer restarts after completion
    #
    # exec_out: Fires immediately when started
    # on_tick: Fires each update while timer is running
    # on_complete: Fires when timer reaches duration
    # elapsed: Seconds since timer started
    # progress: 0.0 to 1.0 progress through duration
    #
    # Timer handling is done by the runtime.
    dur = duration if duration and duration > 0 else 1.0
    return ('exec_out', 'on_tick', 'on_complete', 0.0, 0.0)
